sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46696" key="h(duo/neiros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡδυ-όνειρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n46696.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">causing sweet dreams</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἰσχάδες</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:63:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">63.16</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
